Description: "Updated the vertical video walkthrough to document the new 3-column headline styles grid and general grid-cols-2/grid-cols-3 styling fixes."
Instruction: "Add a new section for the Headline Presets Grid & Layout Optimization in the walkthrough."
ReplacementContent:
"* **Warning Log Levels Type-Safety**:
  * Corrected all occurrences of `'warning'` argument types passed to `addLog` inside `VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx` to use valid parameters (`'info'` or `'error'`), resolving implicit TypeScript type mismatch checks.
* **Headline Presets Grid Reorganization**:
  * Reorganized the **ปรับแต่งสีและสไตล์แถบพาดหัว (Headline Style Presets)** layout into a space-efficient 3-column grid layout (แถวละ 3 ตัวเลือก).
  * Replaced the non-working arbitrary Tailwind class `aspect-[4/3.2]` with a precise `style={{ aspectRatio: '1.25' }}` inline property on the preset buttons.
  * Added global `.grid-cols-2`, `.grid-cols-3`, and `.grid-cols-4` utility classes to the custom Tailwind polyfills block in [index.css](file:///Users/paulpolsulintaboon/Documents/GitHub/ContentFactory/frontend/src/index.css), restoring perfect multi-column rendering behavior to coordinate outputs, settings sliders, and input rows across the application.

### 3. Dashboard Integration & Sidebar Registration"
TargetContent:
"* **Warning Log Levels Type-Safety**:
  * Corrected all occurrences of `'warning'` argument types passed to `addLog` inside `VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx` to use valid parameters (`'info'` or `'error'`), resolving implicit TypeScript type mismatch checks.

### 3. Dashboard Integration & Sidebar Registration"
